response:
I want 10 weaknesses of [Company Name] from 2023, and I want the 10 points to follow this specific format and style:

1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [X]% from [Year] to [Year].
2. [Company Name]'s EPS down $[X] in [Year] from the previous year.
3. [Company Name] share prices down [X]% from [Year] to [Year].
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product source, [Product Type].
5. Total liabilities increased from $[Amount] to $[Amount] from [Year] to [Year].
6. [Company Name] produced [X]% fewer units of [Product] in the first half of [Year] as a result of weak demand from [Sector] due to the [Event].
7. [Competitor Name] [Product Category] sales up [X]% from [Year] to [Year], while [Company Name] has no [Product Category] offerings.
8. [Competitor Name] achieved its goal to provide [Specific Feature] in [X]% of its [Facility Type] by [Date]. [Company Name]'s [Product] have no [Specific Feature].
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately [X]% of their net sales during fiscal year [Year].
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in [Year], from [Charge Type] to [Violation Type].
